description_long: This object is a pair of scissors featuring two elongated, straight metal blades joined at a central pivot. The handles are made of red plastic, molded into two large, oval loops for finger placement, with a smooth and slightly contoured surface for comfort. The blades are metallic gray, with a straight edge and a pointed tip, suitable for precise cutting tasks. The central joint is a visible rivet, securing the blades together and allowing them to pivot smoothly. The handles are symmetrical and appear ambidextrous, accommodating both left- and right-handed users. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of red-handled scissors with straight, pointed metal blades and symmetrical oval finger loops. The handles are smooth plastic, and the blades are joined by a central rivet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the scissors, highlighting the red handles and the straight, pointed metal blades.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two symmetrical finger loops and the narrow profile of the blades.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the handles and blades.
description_view_3: Blade-forward view emphasizing the pointed blade tips and the alignment of the handles behind them.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, oval-shaped, ambidextrous handles made of smooth red plastic with no special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized, oval finger loops with smooth surfaces and no additional inserts or contours.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Straight, pointed blade tips designed for precision cutting.
